case_title: ANNE VAN ABBEMA VS. SIGNATURE BIOSCIENCE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABBEMA, ANNE VAN AS TO DEFENDANT SIGNATURE BIOSCIENCE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABBEMA, ANNE VAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIGNATURE BIOSCIENCE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP. $22,609.48 PRINCIPAL, $310.24 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,220.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
